things.name: Battle of Tarawa WWII Sites
things.description: 1943 battle where 1,000 US Marines died in 76 hours - tanks and bunkers remain

things.name: Betio WWII Museum
things.description: Japanese and American WWII artefacts from the bloodiest battle per hour in the Pacific

things.name: Ambo Island Causeway Drive
things.description: Drive the causeways connecting the islets of South Tarawa with ocean on both sides

things.name: Traditional Maneaba Meeting House
things.description: Oval thatch open-sided meeting hall - centre of I-Kiribati social and political life

things.name: Lagoon Fishing
things.description: Fish the pristine lagoon with local fishermen for yellowfin tuna and wahoo

things.name: Te Umanibong Museum
things.description: I-Kiribati traditional culture, navigation and the WWII history of the Gilbert Islands

things.name: Bairiki National Stadium
things.description: Watch I-Kiribati football or attend a national independence celebration

things.name: Buota Village Traditional Fishing
things.description: Watch the remarkable traditional Kiribati fish-drive techniques in the lagoon

things.name: Nanikai Beach
things.description: Quiet white sand beach on the lagoon side - peaceful and unspoilt

things.name: Toddy (Palm Wine) Tapping
things.description: Watch toddy collectors climb coconut palms at dawn to collect fresh palm sap
